ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the film (e.g., MOVIE, SERIES) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the film's plot */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the film was released */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the film in minutes */,
  "directors" TEXT /* List of directors associated with the film */,
  "cast" TEXT /* List of main actors/actresses in the film */,
  "ratings" TEXT /* Array of ratings from different sources */,
  "awards" TEXT /* List of notable awards won by the film */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Production budget of the film */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Total revenue generated by the film */,
  "streaming_platforms" TEXT /* List of streaming platforms where the film is available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., admin, content manager) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_genres" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the films table */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the genres table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the films table */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., search, view, rating) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "certification_name" TEXT /* Name of the certification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the certification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_certifications" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the films table */,
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the certifications table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "certification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the films table */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the films table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id")
)
